name: Prometheus X Research & Replies Operator
description: Operating playbook for the prometheus-x-research-replies scheduled job: always read memory first, try x_search for fresh AI/tech angles, fallback to browser automation with x-browser-automation-playbook skill if x_search fails, prepare 2 natural replies + 1 original post with no em dashes and human tone, post via browser from @raulinvests, send Telegram screenshot proof, log to memory, and always close browser with browser_close at the end. Prevents duplicates and CDP issues.
author: Prometheus
instructions:
1. Read workspace/prometheus-x-posts-memory.md first to avoid duplicates.
2. Try x_search (external_apps) for fresh AI/tech topics and reply opportunities.
3. If x_search fails (quota, auth, error), fallback: use x-browser-automation-playbook skill to manually search/browse X.com for posts on AI, agent memory, data layers, decentralized systems, and graph orchestration. Collect 2-3 promising posts for replies.
4. Prepare 2 natural replies + 1 original research-based post. No em dashes (—), natural human tone.
5. Use browser automation to post all content from @raulinvests profile.
6. Send screenshot proof to Telegram.
7. Log the posts + research to memory via write_note.
8. Always close browser with browser_close immediately after any browser work.
